root_cause: Report A used calendar-day gaps <= 5 for EPISODE_GAP_5 and 100 bootstrap iterations; current committed code uses trading-session signal_idx gaps <= 5 and default 20 bootstrap iterations. Weekend/calendar gaps split episodes more often, producing 1597 total / 979 OOS episodes and lower raw signals per episode. The current code path is reproducible and matches Report B.
stale_or_superseded: Report A chat/report metrics are superseded; 948410e artifacts and DSS-004F-R rerun are canonical.
offset_set_note: Current offset audit uses the same primary episode list, but trades near sample end can be unavailable for larger offsets, so offset trade counts differ slightly.
bootstrap_note: Negative symbol p05 is from the canonical 20-iteration bootstrap on the current episode sample; Report A 100-iteration positive p05 is noncanonical for this commit.
